notes: v372 — SECURITY hardening (nothing changes in how you use the app). From a full security audit: (1) Closed a gap where a SHARED or PASTED portfolio backup could hide code in its pending-orders and run it when you imported the file. Pending orders and dividends are now cleaned exactly the way your holdings and trades already were, so an imported file can't sneak anything past. (2) Your EODData API key now stays more private — the app tries the DIRECT connection to EODData first and only falls back to the free relay services if your browser genuinely can't reach it, so your key isn't handed to third-party relays unless there's no other way. (3) Tightened the 'get the new version' link so it can only ever open a normal web address. Your portfolio, signals and auto-pilot are unchanged. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5).
